title: No Spear Charge Attack
description: Do you like the spear, but dont like how the charge attack is so stupidly powerful?
body:
# Description
The idea, is simple. so you like the spear, with its cool features, but you hate the charge attack? well then, this is the perfect datapack for you!

## Commands
You can change the settings for the diffrent modes with this command:
```
/function no_spear_charge_attack:cmd/open_config
```

## How it works
Basically the spears are made equipable to your feet.

unfortunately the only way i found that didn't have any draw backs, was un-revertable
